converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Lowell Fitz Randolph papers
Randolph, L. F. (Lowell Fitz), 1894-1980.
21-17-1876
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
1955-1979. Manuscripts, correspondence, reports, publications, notes, and other papers. Manuscripts, correspondence, reports, publications, notes, and other papers concerning corn and iris breeding. Collection material in English 2077624
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
E. Keating
Date completed:
July 2003
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2003
Last modified:
RMC Staff, January 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Lowell Fritz Randolph (Cornell University Ph.D. 1921) was professor of botany at Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Manuscripts, correspondence, reports, publications, notes, photographs, slides, field notes, and other papers concerning corn, iris breeding and his trips to Mexico, Honduras, Guatemala, the West Indies, Europe, India, Soviet Union (USSR) and the Middle East.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Iris Records
Subseries Ia. Field Trip Notebooks
Series II. Manuscript material
Series III. Subject Files
Series IV. Slides
Series V. Items
Cite As:
Lowell Fitz Randolph papers, #21-17-1876. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Field notes Photographs. Slides (Photography). College teachers. Botanists. Botany. Irises (Plants) Corn -- Breeding. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
